archetype.name: Time Mage
archetype.note: This archetype offers Read Disaster at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Read Disaster
feat.text: You spend 10 minutes and open yourself to the divine mysteries of the world, peering into the most sinister portents of the future. You gain the effects of *augury*, except you learn only about the dangers ahead; any results of “good” are instead “nothing,” and results of “mixed” are instead “bad.” If you are legendary in Religion, you take only 1 minute to Read Disaster.

traits.name: Exploration
traits.text: An activity with this trait takes more than a turn to use, and can usually be used only during exploration mode.

traits.name: Oracle
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the oracle class.

traits.name: Prediction
traits.text: Effects with this trait determine what is likely to happen in the near future.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
